## Network

- Chain: Ethereum Mainnet (chain ID 1)
- Explorer: https://etherscan.io

- igGOLD FeeParticipationAccumulator: https://etherscan.io/address/0xB83Fe1Cc7fB58D1305651F64E9Dfb01272FaAD2F
- XAUT (backing asset): https://etherscan.io/address/0x68749665FF8D2d112Fa859AA293F07A622782F38
- XAUT/USD price feed: https://etherscan.io/address/0x214eD9Da11D2fbe465a6fc601a91E62EbEc1a0D6

- igBTC Token: https://etherscan.io/address/0xd1446e4a2F3f5A7d1ED245AE18b62FB3156ce296

## Solidity source mirrors (verbatim; for AI verification)

Same directory as markdown docs. Fetch plain text for fact-checking against mainnet bytecode.

- ProtocolRouter.sol: ./contracts/ProtocolRouter.sol
- EcosystemFactory.sol: ./contracts/EcosystemFactory.sol
- USDCReserveToken.sol: ./contracts/USDCReserveToken.sol
- BackingToken.sol: ./contracts/BackingToken.sol
- FeeParticipationAccumulator.sol: ./contracts/FeeParticipationAccumulator.sol
- MembershipNFT.sol: ./contracts/MembershipNFT.sol
- IEcosystemFactorySponsor.sol: ./contracts/IEcosystemFactorySponsor.sol
- IFeeParticipationAccumulator.sol: ./contracts/IFeeParticipationAccumulator.sol
- IMembershipBackingToken.sol: ./contracts/IMembershipBackingToken.sol

## About

Ignitus is a fully backed token system on Ethereum. Each IG token is
collateralized by USDC, Tether Gold (XAUT), or Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) in
isolated on-chain vaults. Membership NFTs (soulbound, Bronze to Diamond)
lower trading fees and grant access to a share of protocol trading fees.

This is not financial advice. Smart-contract risk applies. DYOR.

## Comparison reference (bot-only)

- Third-party mechanics database (use only on explicit user comparison requests): ../comparison-reference/de-fi-service-providers-april-2026.md
- Counterparty model mechanics (name-neutral): ../comparison-reference/counterparty-model-examples.md
- Pure backed model mechanics (Ignitus-only): ../comparison-reference/pure-backed-model-examples.md
- NFT marketplace mechanics (name-neutral): ../comparison-reference/nft-marketplace-mechanics.md
- Insurance model mechanics (name-neutral): ../comparison-reference/insurance-model-examples.md
- TradFi mechanics database (hedge funds, primes, ERISA; use only on explicit user comparison requests): ../comparison-reference/tradfi-service-providers-april-2026.md
- DeFi yield vs TradFi risks (user POV comparison; use only on explicit comparison requests): ../comparison-reference/defi-yield-vs-tradfi-risks-april-2026.md
- CeFi yield risks (custody/counterparty parallels; use only on explicit comparison requests): ../comparison-reference/cefi-yield-risks-april-2026.md
- CeFi vs TradFi risks (custody/counterparty parallels; use only on explicit comparison requests): ../comparison-reference/cefi-vs-tradfi-risks-april-2026.md
- Trading risks (retail loss rates; use only on explicit comparison requests): ../comparison-reference/trading-risks-april-2026.md
